domainName.note: When dependent op needs 'domainName' param, use for_each=aws.apigateway.get_domain_names and set domainName='{{ item.domainName }}'

basePath.note: When dependent op needs 'basePath' param, use for_each=aws.apigateway.get_domain_names and set basePath='{{ item.basePath }}'

clientCertificateId.note: When dependent op needs 'clientCertificateId' param, use for_each=aws.apigateway.get_client_certificates and set clientCertificateId='{{ item.clientCertificateId }}'

id.note: When dependent op needs 'id' param, use for_each=aws.apigateway.get_api_keys and set id='{{ item.id }}'
